---
title: "Are dark-backed birds darker overall?"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-10"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F)
# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)
library(ggpubr)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(sjPlot)

```


```{r prep data - geographic variation in color, echo = FALSE}

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")


avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_allpop_avgimg_wide.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
asy <- avg_img %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY")



```

# define comparisons

```{r define comparisons, echo = F}

comparisons <- list(
  list(x = "PC1_d", y = "PC1_c",      xlab = "Dorsum PC1",  ylab = "Crown PC1"),
  list(x = "PC1_d", y = "PC1_w",      xlab = "Dorsum PC1",  ylab = "Wingspot PC1"),
  list(x = "PC1_d", y = "area_mm2_w", xlab = "Dorsum PC1",  ylab = "Wingspot area (mm²)"),
  list(x = "PC1_d", y = "PC1_t",      xlab = "Dorsum PC1",  ylab = "Throat PC1"),
  list(x = "PC1_d", y = "PC1_o",      xlab = "Dorsum PC1",  ylab = "Covert PC1"),
  list(x = "PC1_d", y = "PC1_b",      xlab = "Dorsum PC1",  ylab = "Belly PC1"),
  list(x = "PC1_t", y = "PC1_w",      xlab = "Throat PC1",  ylab = "Wingspot PC1"),
  list(x = "PC1_t", y = "area_mm2_w", xlab = "Throat PC1",  ylab = "Wingspot area (mm²)")
)

plot_theme <- theme_classic2() +
  theme(
    strip.text    = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text     = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title    = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.text   = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title  = element_text(size = 18),
    plot.title    = element_text(size = 18)
  )

```

# normality checks

```{r normality, echo = F}

vars_to_check <- unique(unlist(lapply(comparisons, function(cmp) c(cmp$x, cmp$y))))

for (v in vars_to_check) {
  hist(asy[[v]], main = v, xlab = v)
}

```

# correlation models and plots

```{r correlation models and plots, echo = F}

for (cmp in comparisons) {
  cat("\n\n###", cmp$xlab, "vs", cmp$ylab, "\n\n")

  fmla <- as.formula(paste(cmp$y, "~", cmp$x, "+ (1|Year) + (1|prepartor)"))
  z <- lmerTest::lmer(fmla, data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
  print(summary(z))
  print(r.squaredGLMM(z))
  print(tab_model(z))

  p <- ggplot(asy) +
    geom_point(aes(x = .data[[cmp$x]], y = .data[[cmp$y]], col = lat), size = 4) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(x = .data[[cmp$x]], y = .data[[cmp$y]]), method = "lm", col = "black") +
    labs(x = cmp$xlab, y = cmp$ylab) +
    plot_theme
  print(p)
}

```

# wingspot vs other plumage patches

```{r wingspot v}

crown <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_c ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(crown)

covert <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_o ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(covert)

belly <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_b ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(belly)

throat <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_t ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(throat)

tvc <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_t ~ PC1_o + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(tvc)

```

# make a table of results
```{r color model table, echo=F}

#association with dorsum
cd <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_c ~ PC1_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, 
                       na.action = na.exclude)
td <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_t ~ PC1_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, 
                       na.action = na.exclude)
od <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_o ~ PC1_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, 
                       na.action = na.exclude) 
bd <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_b ~ PC1_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, 
                       na.action = na.exclude) 
ws <- lmerTest::lmer(area_mm2_w ~ PC1_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, 
                       na.action = na.exclude) 
#associations with wing spot color
cwpc <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_c ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
owpc <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_o ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
bwpc <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_b ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
dwpc <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
twpc <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_t ~ PC1_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
#association with wing spot area
cwa <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_c ~ area_mm2_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
owa <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_o ~ area_mm2_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
bwa <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_b ~ area_mm2_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
dwa <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ area_mm2_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
twa <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_t ~ area_mm2_w + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
models <- c(cd, od, bd, td, ws, cwpc, owpc, bwpc, dwpc, twpc, cwa, owa, bwa, dwa, twa)

# Initialize an empty data frame to store results
results <- data.frame(
  Response = character(),
  Explanatory = character(),
  P_value = numeric(),
  R2m = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Loop through each model
for (model_name in 1:length(models)) {
  model <- models[[model_name]]
  
  # Extract response variable
  response <- as.character(formula(model)[[2]])
  
  # Extract explanatory variables
  explanatory <- paste(as.character(formula(model)[[3]]), collapse = " + ")
  
  # Extract marginal R² (R2m)
  r_squared <- MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)
  R2m <- r_squared[1]  # Marginal R²
  
  # Extract p-value for the first fixed effect
  summary_model <- summary(model)
  p_value <- summary_model$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]  # Adjust index for the variable of interest
  
  # Add results to the data frame
  results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
    Response = response,
    Explanatory = explanatory,
    R2m = R2m,
    P_value = p_value,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}

results_rounded <- results %>% 
   mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(. < 0.001, 
                                           sprintf("%.2e", .),  # scientific notation
                                           sprintf("%.2g", .)))) # 3 sig figs
#change names for table presentation
pcnames <- c(
  "PC1_c" = "Crown PC1",
  "PC1_o" = "Covert PC1",
  "PC1_b" = "Belly PC1",
  "PC1_d" = "Dorsum PC1",
  "PC1_t" = "Throat PC1",
  "PC1_w" = "Wing spot PC1",
  "area_mm2_w" = "Wing spot area (mm²)"
)

formnames <- c(
  "+ + PC1_d + (1 | Year) + (1 | prepartor)" = "Fixed effect: Dorsum PC1, Random effect: Year, preparator",
  "+ + PC1_w + (1 | Year) + (1 | prepartor)" = "Fixed effect: Wing spot PC1, Random effect: Year, preparator",
  "+ + area_mm2_w + (1 | Year) + (1 | prepartor)" = "Fixed effect: Wing spot area (mm²), Random effect: Year, preparator"
)

results_rnm <- results_rounded %>%
  mutate(Response = recode(Response, !!!pcnames)) %>% 
  mutate(Explanatory = recode(Explanatory, !!!formnames))
# View the results
print(results_rnm)

write.csv(results_rnm, file = here("results/Color_lmm_model_results.csv"), row.names = F)

```
